name: hosts-ssh
title: Hosts SSH
description: Quick SSH launcher for hosts from /etc/hosts with git repo browsing and cloning
author: Hansi

commands.name: hosts
commands.title: SSH Hosts
commands.description: Browse and connect to SSH hosts from /etc/hosts

commands.name: repos
commands.title: Git Repos
commands.description: Search git repositories across all SSH hosts

preferences.name: terminal
preferences.title: Terminal
preferences.description: Terminal command for SSH. Empty uses the default. Examples: 'kitty -1 kitten', 'foot -e'

preferences.name: sshUser
preferences.title: SSH User
preferences.description: Default SSH username. Leave empty to use system default

preferences.name: hostPrefix
preferences.title: Host Prefix
preferences.description: Only show hosts starting with this prefix. Leave empty for all hosts

preferences.name: cloneDirectory
preferences.title: Clone Directory
preferences.description: Directory to clone repositories into. Empty uses home directory
